title: pelargonium × clausum
intro: Pelargonium × clausum, also known as Cape Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Pelargonium genus, characterized by its small, white flowers and compact growth habit. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of rosmarinic acid, which has been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × clausum include reducing symptoms of anxiety and stress, as well as providing relief from digestive issues such as upset stomachs and irritable bowel syndrome. Herbal preparations of this plant are commonly used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for therapeutic purposes.
